sections.model_description: BasicTextClassifier-v1 is a fine-tuned DistilBERT model for multi-class topic classification. The model categorizes news articles into 4 categories: Sports, Politics, Technology, and Entertainment. It uses a simple classification head on top of the [CLS] token representation.
sections.intended_use: Classifying news articles by topic for content recommendation systems and editorial workflows.
sections.training_data: Trained on the AG News dataset (120,000 training samples, 7,600 test samples). The dataset is publicly available and contains English-language news articles from 2004-2005.
sections.evaluation_metrics: Accuracy: 90.2%, Macro-F1: 0.89. Evaluated on the standard AG News test split.
sections.ethical_considerations: News classification could be used to create filter bubbles. Users should ensure diverse content exposure in downstream applications.
sections.citation: Sanh et al., 2019 — DistilBERT, a distilled version of BERT.
